subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath ascended from the prison and His call hath been raised to such heights that all the dwellers of the earth have heard it, namely those souls who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الهی از زندان مرتفع و ندایش بلند بشانیکه جمیع اهل زمین شنیدند یعنی نفوسیکه خود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @living waters; water of life
